name: Beef and Broccoli Tips
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Sirloin Steak, sliced into 1/5 inch x 2-inch strips
1/2 Cup carrot strips, parboiled for 2 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add beef strips and stir-fry for 5 to 8 minutes or until just done.
3. Add onion and parboiled carrot; continue cooking for an additional 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Add broccoli and water. Return to heat and cook for approximately 6 more minutes, or until the broccoli is tender.
6. Remove from heat. Mix in soy sauce to taste.
7. Serve over cooked ramen noodles according to package directions. Fresh or frozen cauliflower may be added with the broccoli.
